popularStory.headline: SARAH (LEARNED) from wikitree
popularStory.description:
From: wikitree
 
THOMAS LATHROP [#302], b. abt. 1621, d. 1707, m. 11 Dec 1639 SARAH (LEARNED) Ewer (dau. of William Learned and Goodith), prob. bap. Ware, Hertfordshire, England 20 Sep 1604 [1].Sarah …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Learned於1606年1月18日出生在英國素瑞貝爾蒙時，她的父親William Learned16歲，母親Goodith Gillman21歲。她於1623年1月13日與Thomas Lothrop在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1652年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波享年46歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Learned于1606年1月18日出生在英国素瑞貝爾蒙时，她的父亲William Learned16岁，母亲Goodith Gillman21岁。她于1623年1月13日与Thomas Lothrop在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1652年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波享年46岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼。

nameMeanings.name: Learned
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of English   Leonard  . An intermediate stage in this change is   Learnard  . Compare   Larned  .

History: William Learned was admitted to the First Church in Charlestown, MA, in 1632, and in 1640 was one of the first settlers of Woburn, MA. One of his better known descendants, Ebenezer, a revolutionary war officer, was born at Oxford, MA, in 1728.

variants.name: Leonard
meanings: English; French (Léonard); Walloon (mainly Léonard): from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements leo ‘lion’ (a late addition to the vocabulary of ancient Germanic name elements, taken from Latin) + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’, which was taken to England by the Normans. A Christian saint of this name, who is supposed to have lived in the 6th century, but about whom nothing is known except for a largely fictional life dating from half a millennium later, was popular throughout Europe in the early Middle Ages and was regarded as the patron of peasants and horses. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, e.g. Italian Leonardo , Polish, Slovenian, etc. Lenart or Lenard , and probably also their derivatives. Compare Larned , Learned , and Yenor .
Irish (Fermanagh): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Mac Giolla Fhionáin or of Langan .
German: variant of   Leonhard  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Larned
meanings: Variant of   Learned  , itself an altered form of English   Leonard  .

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Learned was born on 18 January 1606, in Bermondsey, Surrey, England, her father, William Learned, was 16 and her mother, Goodith Gillman, was 21. She married Thomas Lothrop on 13 January 1623, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1652, in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 46, and was buried in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Learned est née le 18 janvier 1606, à Bermondsey, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, William Learned, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Goodith Gillman, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Lothrop le 13 janvier 1623, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1652, à Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Learned am 18. Januar 1606 in Bermondsey, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Learned 16 und ihre Mutter Goodith Gillman 21. Sie hat am 13. Januar 1623 in England Thomas Lothrop geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1652 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Learned è nata il il 18 gennaio 1606 nel Bermondsey, Surrey, England, sua padre, William Learned, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Goodith Gillman, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Lothrop il 13 gennaio 1623, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1652, nel Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Learnedが1606年1月18日にイギリススリーバーモンドセイで生まれた時，父William Learnedは16歳，母Goodith Gillmanは21歳であった。1623年1月13日にイギリスでThomas Lothropと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1652年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルバーンスタブルで46歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Learned(이)가 1606년 1월 18일 영국 수리 버몽시에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Learned(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Goodith Gillman(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1623년 1월 13일 영국에서 Thomas Lothrop(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1652년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 바른스타블일에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Thomas Lothrop em 13 de janeiro de 1623, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1652, em Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Learned родилась 18 января 1606 г. в местности бирмондси, сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени William Learned было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Goodith Gillman, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Lothrop 13 января 1623 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1652 г. в местности барнстабл, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Learned nació el 18 de enero de 1606, en Bermondsey, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, William Learned, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Goodith Gillman, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Thomas Lothrop el 13 de enero de 1623, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1652, en Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
